_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: Audited 2026-06-04 batch. Ported team-app's new shippingCalc.js verbatim into customer-portal/src/lib/. Rebuilt RequestShipmentWizard step 2 as 'Shipping & price' — calculator runs per address, shows DHL Economy/Express + Hive options with prices (excl/incl VAT toggle), ETAs, and cheapest/fastest badges; unknown-weight items get an inline weight-input panel before pricing unlocks. Resolved weight/volume is persisted back to warehouse_inventory on submit. Locked-in quote captured in new warehouse_requests columns: quoted_price_cents, quoted_price_includes_vat, quoted_carrier_name, quoted_service_id, quoted_service_label, quoted_speed, quoted_box_count, quoted_total_weight_kg, quoted_at. Added warehouse_inventory_client view exposure of unit_weight_grams + unit_volume_ml. New 'Shipping costs' sub-tab on WarehousePage: this-month / last-30-days / YTD stat tiles, spend-by-month bar list, full priced-shipment list with carrier + speed + VAT-aware totals. Skipped: lead-score / Leads tab (team-only); CataloguePage team-app changes (low risk for portal); ProposalsBoard tweaks.
